summary_en: 600,000 shares (3.83% of shares outstanding) up to ¥593.4M. ToSTNeT-3 order placed 26 May 2026, 08:45 JST, at limit price ¥989.0 (prior day close). Order valid for that trading session only. Results published after market close. Part of ¥3.0B authorization (2.5M shares, 15.96% S/O) approved 27 Mar 2026, window through 27 Mar 2027. Cumulative acquisitions as of 25 May 2026: 0 shares, ¥0.
title_en: Notice Regarding Acquisition of Treasury Stock via Off-Hours Trading (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: Advanced Media announced on 25 May 2026 a single-day off-hours buyback block via ToSTNeT-3. The company will place a buy order for up to 600,000 shares (3.83% of shares outstanding) at a limit price of ¥989 (the previous day's closing price), to be executed at 08:45 JST on 26 May 2026. The aggregate acquisition amount is capped at ¥593.4M. This order is valid only during the specified trading window; partial or complete non-execution is possible depending on market conditions. Results will be published after market close. This block is drawn from a larger authorization approved on 27 March 2026 by the board, permitting acquisition of up to 2.5M shares (15.96% of shares outstanding) for up to ¥3.0B over the one-year period ending 27 March 2027. As of 25 May 2026, the company had acquired 0 shares under the authorization.
